claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A controlled or uncontrolled tab system with explicit activation, orientation, direction, overflow, disabled-key, and URL-state policies.
semantics: React Aria owns tablist, tab, tabpanel, selected, focus, and labelling relationships using stable string values.
Automatic activation follows focus; manual activation requires Enter or Space; Home, End, orientation arrows, disabled skipping, and RTL spatial order remain testable.
Horizontal lists scroll inline and vertical lists scroll blockwise without clipping focus at 320 CSS pixels or 400 percent zoom.
Optional href values enable a progressive-enhancement URL recipe and reject empty, data, javascript, and vbscript protocols.

preferences.forcedColors: System focus and selected borders remain visible without color-only state.
preferences.reducedMotion: No selection or scrolling behavior depends on animation.
preferences.rtl: Explicit direction controls horizontal spatial keys independently from the surrounding content locale.

responsive.overflowPolicy: The tab list exposes native scrolling while the selected tab and focus indicator stay reachable.
